g.title: vandelay.import_item:import_error->vandelay.import_error:code
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (import_error) REFERENCES vandelay.import_error(code) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
